Tests the modulus operation with a negative dividend in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the modulus operation in JavaScript. It verifies that the result of `-100 % 3` is less than zero. The code uses the `assert` function to ensure that the condition is true, which is a common practice in testing to validate expected outcomes. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on confirming the sign of the result of a modulus operation with a negative dividend.
